title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.task: Discuss how the following aspects of international travel can contribute to personal development, then decide which two are the most valuable.

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some aspects of international travel that can help people develop personally.
Now decide which two aspects of travel are the most valuable for personal development.
